issues.description: Missing condition for cost requirement: Must rest 2 DON!! cards and trash this Character. DSL lacks cost modeling.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) Look at top 5 cards (not generic deck search), (2) Filter for {The Akazaya Nine} type, (3) Reveal up to 2 cards, (4) Add to hand, (5) Place rest at bottom in any order. Current filter 'Any' is wrong.
SearchDeck is insufficient for this multi-step effect. Requires custom DSL structure to model: peek top 5, filter type, reveal up to 2, hand, reorder remainder to bottom.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest 2 of your DON!! cards and trash this Character: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 2 {The Akazaya Nine} type cards and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
